<python_code>
import numpy as np

# Get the grasp pose for the red cube
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach the red cube from 10 cm above to ensure safe descent
z_approach_distance = 0.10

# Move to the approach pose above the grasp position
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quasp_quaternion, z_approach=z_approach_distance)

# Open the gripper before grasping
open_gripper()

# Perform the actual grasp motion (move down to the grasp pose)
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.0)

# Close the gripper to pick up the red cube
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube by moving upward along the Z-axis by 10 cm
lifted_position = grasp_position + np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.10])
goto_pose(lifted_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.0)
</python_code>
